blockingIssues.description: The durability fix now awaits the persistence helper, but `persistSession()` still catches and swallows `setSecureItem(SESSION_KEY, ...)` failures, so `hydrateRestored()` can resolve and `RecoveryRestoreScreen` can navigate away even when the restored `session:state` snapshot never committed durably.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce the skill honesty gate from transcript evidence: do not allow `skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true` unless the saved transcript skeleton shows the required `.factory/library` reads and a red-first test cycle before implementation edits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The round-3 fix review for session `c30c7ef5-5df7-4782-a6c6-b043368ff7b5` repeated the same issue seen in earlier onboarding-ux fixes: the saved transcript skeleton showed source/test-file reads plus a green targeted test run before edits, but no reads of `.factory/library/architecture.md`, `.factory/library/environment.md`, or `.factory/library/user-testing.md`, and no failing test run before the implementation.
